title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters. Return the length as an integer.
constraints: s consists of English letters, digits, symbols and spaces

examples.explanation: The answer is "abc", with the length of 3.
The answer is "b", with the length of 1.

hints: Use a sliding window with two pointers.
A hash set can track characters currently in the window.
Move the left pointer right when you encounter a duplicate.
